name: Banana Muffins (from Triple Muffin Mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg, oil, and mashed bananas in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the muffin mix until just combined.
3. Grease a muffin pan with additional vegetable oil if needed.
4. Spoon the batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and allow to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Per muffin:
318.4 calories
10.4 grams fat (1.5 grams saturated fat)
28.7% of calories from fat
